seoTitle: Make Text Appear/Disappear on Canva Video
metaDescription: Learn how to make text appear and disappear on a Canva video using timed animations, ideal for highlights and captions.
intro: Timed text effects let you emphasize key points at the right moment in a video, rather than having captions on screen the whole time. This is useful for tutorials, product highlights, and social clips. This guide covers setting up text that appears and disappears on cue.

steps.heading: Add your text to the video
steps.body: Type your text and place it on the frame where you want it to first appear.

steps.heading: Set the entrance animation
steps.body: Click Animate and choose an entrance style, such as fade or pop, for how the text appears.

steps.heading: Set the exit animation
steps.body: Choose an exit animation as well so the text disappears smoothly rather than cutting off abruptly.

steps.heading: Adjust the timing on the timeline
steps.body: Drag the text element's position on the timeline to control exactly when it appears and disappears.

steps.heading: Preview and fine-tune
steps.body: Play back the video to check the timing feels natural, adjusting durations as needed.

faq.question: Can I set different timing for multiple text elements?
faq.answer: Yes, each text element on the timeline can have its own independent entrance and exit timing.

faq.question: Are text animations free in Canva?
faq.answer: Yes, a range of animation styles are available on the free plan, with more advanced ones in Canva Pro.

faq.question: Can I sync text appearance with specific video moments?
faq.answer: Yes, by dragging the text clip along the timeline to align with the exact frame you want.

faq.question: Will this work for text over a static background too?
faq.answer: Yes, the same timed animation approach works whether the background is a video or a still image.
